steps.title: Identify the study and limit
steps.content: The first part introduces Ortega and colleagues' use of historical DNA to study a pathogen. The second part explains why that approach is not widely used: historical DNA is often degraded and hard to repair with current methods.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: B says the text explains how to overcome the difficulty, but it does not. C says findings and replication are discussed, but they are not. D calls the method common even though the text says it is underutilized. The answer is A.
